data.body:
COMPLETION VERIFICATION (read-only, fresh session) — VERDICT: FAIL.

Verified each child's compiled state this session via show_ticket. The epic's PRIMARY acceptance criterion is "All six child stories (S1-S6) closed."

Child status (authoritative):
- S1 0250-36d4-c97f-47b4 (make-fawn-box, runner-seam caching): status=in_progress, signature=null.
- S2 c6e5-9936-d07c-4b16 (pale-fist-prow, engine-wide caching): status=in_progress, signature=null (FORCE_CLAIMed — plan-review gate bypassed).
- S3 ba7e-dd8d-7cac-453f (vale-noun-tumor, parallelize + warm-then-fan-out + budget cap): status=in_progress, signature=null (FORCE_CLAIMed).
- S4 98c6-81c7-175e-416f (run-atom-drawl, merge G3+G4): status=OPEN, signature=null; carries live unresolved G4 container-review findings (per-child guardrail ownership split S4/S5).
- S5 1762-9641-993a-464f (adept-pen-flame, child bin-packing): status=OPEN, signature=null.
- S6 da34-ac98-e375-4af0 (safe-peg-tuner, fidelity-eval harness): status=in_progress, signature=null (FORCE_CLAIMed); carries a live G4 finding (S4/S5-vs-S6 gate-strength mismatch).

=> 0 of 6 children closed (2 open, 4 in_progress); none signed by the completion-verifier gate. AC1 is decisively unmet, and the epic itself is status=in_progress (preconditions_summary.status="pre-manifest").

Other ACs not demonstrable as closed deliverables:
- "8-child epic review completes in minutes / materially lower token cost (cache reads non-zero)": no epic-level end-to-end measurement is recorded as a closed deliverable; the S1/S3 runs (E1/E2/A) are de-risk SPIKES, not the epic acceptance measurement. Eval-gated children S4/S5 are unstarted (open).
- "Findings remain within offline-eval tolerance (no fidelity regression)": the fidelity instrument is S6's live semantic eval (in_progress); S4/S5 are explicitly eval-gated on S6 (da34 blocks 98c6 and 1762) and remain open.
- "make lint + full suite pass": not verifiable as an epic-close artifact while the eval-gated work (S4/S5) is unimplemented.

NOTE (does not change the verdict): substantial S1/S3/S6 code HAS landed in the tree, but completion is determined by signed child-ticket CLOSURE, not code presence; closure status is authoritative and shows the work incomplete. Path to close: drive S1/S2/S3/S6 to signed close, implement+close the eval-gated S4/S5 (resolving the open S4/S6 G4 findings), then re-verify the epic-level wall-clock/token/fidelity/lint criteria.
